What We Do

Individual Tax Services

Whether it's your first return, a complex multi-state filing, or an ITIN application — every situation gets the same careful attention and accurate filing.

1040 Personal Returns

Federal Form 1040 prepared, reviewed, and e-filed. Standard or itemized — we run both and file whichever puts more money in your pocket.

ITIN Applications (W-7)

Full Form W-7 preparation as a Certified Acceptance Agent. No need to mail original passports.

Amended Returns (1040X)

Missed a deduction or got a corrected W-2? We file Form 1040X to recover what you're owed.

Multi-State Returns

Moved mid-year or worked across state lines? We handle part-year and non-resident state filings.

Self-Employed & Gig

Schedule C basics, 1099-NEC reconciliation, mileage and home-office deductions, SE tax.

Tax Planning & Estimates

Quarterly estimated payment calculations and year-round planning to avoid April surprises.

Track Record

Numbers That Matter

Real refunds, real returns, real clients. No exaggerations.

About

Licensed.
Bilingual. Detail-Driven.

Meridian Tax is led by a federally-licensed Enrolled Agent who specializes exclusively in individual taxpayers — no business returns, no bookkeeping, no distractions.

Every return is reviewed line-by-line before it's e-filed, and every client gets a clear explanation of where their refund came from (or why they owe). No jargon, no surprises.

Enrolled AgentIRS PTINNAEA Membere-File Authorized

How It Works

Three Simple Steps

From upload to refund — clear timeline, no surprises.

1

Upload Documents

Send W-2s, 1099s, and any prior returns through our secure client portal.

2

Review & Approve

We prepare your return, walk you through every line, and answer every question before filing.

3

e-File & Refund

We e-file federal and state returns. Most refunds land in your account within 21 days.

Client Reviews

What Clients Say

“
As a freelancer with 1099s from six different clients, I was dreading tax season. They sorted out my Schedule C, found deductions I didn't know existed, and got me a $2,100 refund.
Freelance Designer
Self-Employed · Schedule C
“
First year filing jointly after the wedding and we had no clue what we were doing. They walked us through every form, filed both states, and made the whole thing painless.
Newlyweds
Married Filing Jointly
“
I needed an ITIN to file my first US return. As a Certified Acceptance Agent they handled the W-7 without me having to mail my passport overseas. ITIN approved in six weeks.
New Resident
ITIN Application · Form W-7

Without the Stress

Free 30-minute consultation. We tell you exactly what you need, what it costs, and how big your refund will be.
